# Marketing Manager

From Fivetran’s founding until now, our mission has remained the same: to make access to data as simple and reliable as electricity. With Fivetran, customer data arrives in their warehouses, canonical and ready to query, with no engineering or maintenance required. We’re proud that more organizations continue to leverage our technology every day to become truly data-driven.About The RoleThis is an exciting opportunity to be our first dedicated marketing hire in Singapore! As the Marketing Manager, you will play a pivotal role in establishing and growing our presence in the ASEAN market. Your focus countries would be Singapore, Indonesia, Malaysia, Thailand and India. You will be responsible for developing and executing a comprehensive marketing strategy focused on events, partner marketing, email marketing and case studies.This role requires a hands-on, entrepreneurial spirit and the ability to work independently while collaborating effectively with global teams. You will have the opportunity to shape our marketing efforts from the ground up and make a significant contribution to our success in ASEAN.This role will report directly to the Head of Marketing - APAC, based in Sydney, Australia.As our Regional Marketing Manager for ASEAN, you will be the driving force behind our local market presence. Success in this role means transitioning from a supportive team player to a high-energy leader who scales our regional footprint through meticulous execution and strategic alignment.You will be measured by your ability to:

- Execute with Precision: Demonstrate exceptional organisational proficiency by managing the regional budget and project timelines with increasing independence and disciplined prioritization.
- Master Cross-Functional Rhythms: Navigate time zones and cultural nuances to establish seamless working cadences with Sales, Alliances, and Global Marketing teams.
- Establish Local Authority: Build Fivetran’s credibility by producing high-impact, local content and hosti
role_fit_rationale: Marketing Manager at SaaS/tech company in Singapore; strong title, seniority, and industry alignment.
skills_match_rationale: Deep demand gen, email marketing, campaign execution, and cross-functional collaboration directly relevant.
company_snapshot: Fivetran: Series D+ data integration SaaS company. Glassdoor reviews mixed—culture praised, management concerns noted.
red_flags: First marketing hire in region; solo execution risk.
standout_positives: Shape ASEAN marketing from ground up; high visibility role.

We are motivated individuals who tackle unique technical challenges at scale and solve them as a team. Together, we deliver innovative and ethical solutions that help businesses achieve their ambitions faster.Marketing Lead, APACAdyen is looking for an experienced, strategic leader with a proven track record in B2B marketing. This role will work from our Singapore office and report directly to the VP Marketing, APAC.The Marketing Lead, APAC is responsible for creating Adyen’s marketing strategy in order to drive marketing goals with a heavy focus on new customer acquisition, spanning positioning and demand generation across owned, earned and paid channels. You will serve as a conduit between local commercial leadership teams and marketing teams on regional and global level.The ideal candidate has a strong commercial mindset, is motivated to form an intimate understanding of Adyen’s business model and commercial organization and excellent communication skills. We are looking for an experienced leader who thrives in an international environment, and who is passionate about coaching marketers to create successful programs throughout the funnel.What You’ll Do

- Work closely with the VP of Marketing, APAC on strategic and operational projects that drive impact for the larger marketing organization
- Work closely with the global and regional marke

Assessing market trends, quantifying opportunities and developing marketing programs, Field Marketing at Dell Technologies is at the forefront of customer engagement. Responsible for a specific location, department or product, our teams drive marcom strategy – from making budget recommendations to defining roadmaps and informing content themes. Interacting directly with customers and utilizing third-party customer data, they provide Dell’s product marketing and messaging team with game-changing feedback. At the highest level, they develop and drive marketing policies and activities, from market research through brand management and product development to pricing.Join us to do the best work of your career and make a profound social impact as a Field Marketing Consultant on our Field Marketing Team in Singapore.What You’ll AchieveOversee the translation of global Digital Demand Gen and campaign strategies into actionable regional plans. Compile and own brief to ensure that global digital demand-gen strategy is effectively communicated and translated. Ensure that regional digital-demand generation efforts are aligned with global brand positioning and goals.Ensure that regional strategy is effectively aligned with global digital demand-gen strategy.Partner with regional media buyers, creative, and analytics teams to drive campaign execution and optimization.Serve as the main conduit between regional teams and leadership, ensuring alignment, communication, and consistency.Manages relationships with key internal stakeholders (e.g. BU, field, etc.)Measure and improve regional campaign performance against global digital demand generation KPIs.You will:

- Governance & Performance Management: Maintain adherence to global activation frameworks, messaging, and brand standards. Track and report on key performance indicators, providing regional insights to global leadership. Identify gaps or inefficiencies in region
role_fit_rationale: Marketing role but hardware/traditional tech company; title doesn't align with desired titles.
skills_match_rationale: Strong demand gen, digital campaign, and cross-functional experience align well with JD requirements.
company_snapshot: Dell is a global MNC with Singapore presence but operates in hardware—a candidate avoid-industry. Glassdoor has extensive reviews.
red_flags: Hardware company explicitly on candidate's avoid list.
standout_positives: Global MNC scale; regional campaign strategy scope.

About Wonder

Wonder is a leading payments gateway and FinTech platform for merchants in Hong Kong and Asia Pacific, enabling any merchant to get paid effortlessly.

Currently, Wonder is Hong Kong’s first fully digital all-in-one payments gateway platform where any merchant can self-KYC online in minutes, open an account, collect payments and manage transactions all from a single mobile app. Core products include the Wonder App (Mobile App), Wonder Smart Terminal (O2O Payments), Wonder Card (Custom Card) and Wonder Portal (Desktop Dashboard). For selected merchants, Wonder also offers instant payments settlement (T+0), also one of the first in Hong Kong. As of today, Wonder is growing exponentially month-on-month and is well-positioned to become the no.1 payments gateway platform in Hong Kong.

Headquartered in Hong Kong, Bindo Labs raised its USD 6MM series A funding round in 2021 led by Hong Kong Telecom (HKT) / Pacific Century Group. Bindo Labs has offices across Mainland China and Asia Pacific, including Shenzhen, Changsha and Singapore.

What You Will Do:

- Performance Tracking & Reporting: Monitoring and reporting on marketing KPIs to continuously optimise, improve and measure the effectiveness of marketing efforts.
- Cross-functional Collaboration: Work closely with the marketing team and take ownership of the marketing vertical to build Wonder into a household brand in the payments and FinTech space. Collaborate with the implementation team to execute technical, onsite and offsite search engine optimisation.
- Campaigns Management: Create, coordinate and implement search engine marketing campaigns. Full-stack content creation including SEO blogging, social media posts and short videos.
- Brand Management: End-to-end execution of marketing campaigns across major social media channels including digital and traditional media to build brand awareness, drive sales and market share. Creation of sales & marketing materials for business development purposes as needed.
- Strategy Planning: You have to develop and imp
role_fit_rationale: Fintech Marketing Manager title fits, but Series A startup and execution-heavy role skew junior.
skills_match_rationale: SEO/SEM and content creation focus differs from candidate's B2B demand gen and martech strengths.
company_snapshot: HK-based fintech payments gateway, Series A (2021), small SG office. Glassdoor reviews sparse and mixed; poor management noted.
red_flags: Series A, poor management reviews, JD truncated/vague

# Director of Demand Generation, Field and Partner Marketing, APAC

Country: SG

City: Singapore

Job Category: Marketing

Denodo is a leader in data management. The award-winning Denodo Platform is the leading data integration, management, and delivery platform using a logical approach to enable self- service BI, data science, hybrid/multi-cloud data integration, and enterprise data services. Realizing more than 400% ROI and millions of dollars in benefits, Denodo’s large enterprise and mid-market customers across 30+ industries have received payback in less than 6 months. For more information, visit [www.denodo.com]<web_link>.

We are a fast-growing, international organization with teams across four continents and we work with a cutting-edge technology, but that's not all we have to offer. At Denodo, we are like a family and it is of the utmost importance to us that we help support your professional growth every step of the way

## Job Description

Denodo is looking for an experienced, highly motivated, and visionary individual to lead our APAC Demand Generation, Field and Partner Marketing function into its next phase of transformation. The selected candidate will be primarily responsible for leading and empowering a regional team of specialists to ensure the GTM strategy is well executed for a high-quality production to meet the Marketing goals and targets. You will also implement the approach to drive sustainable growth, ensuring the regional objectives are met with rigorous operational excellence and a relentless focus on ROI. Being the bridge between Sales and Marketing, you will partner closely with the APAC Sales leaders to turn fragmented regional efforts into a resilient, unified revenue-generating force.

## Job Responsibilities & Duties

Strategic Marketing & Leadership:

- Ensure year-over-year growth in marketing leads and improve conversion rates to sales meeti
role_fit_rationale: Director-level with team leadership exceeds candidate's seniority; B2B SaaS demand gen aligns well.
skills_match_rationale: Strong demand gen, GTM, and marketing ops experience; lacks people management track record required.
company_snapshot: Denodo: data management SaaS firm, global presence. Glassdoor reviews appear mismatched (hospital); sparse company-specific data.
red_flags: Director role likely too senior; no relevant company reviews found
standout_positives: APAC regional scope; high-growth B2B SaaS; revenue-focused marketing

About The JobThe Red Hat APAC Enterprise Marketing team is looking for a detail-oriented Marketing Programs Specialist to serve as the operational backbone of our region. In this role, you will support the execution of marketing strategies across our key verticals (Financial Services, Public Sector, Telco, and Manufacturing) while owning the governance, budgeting, and compliance framework for the team.This is not just an admin role; it is a "Control Tower" role. You will ensure our marketing investment delivers maximum ROI by managing the fiscal health of our campaigns and supporting our Marketing Leads in executing world-class programs.What You'll Do

- Support the delivery of major regional programs (e.g., Executive Exchanges, FSI Roadshows) by managing timelines, production schedules, and internal stakeholder communications.
- Partner with Senior Industry Leads to execute tactical elements of campaigns, including event logistics, webinar operations, and vendor management.
- Campaign Execution Support (40%):

- Serve as the primary liaison with APAC Finance and Procurement to unblock vendor payments and contract reviews.
- Maintain real-time budget trackers for all industry verticals, ensuring zero overspend and accurate quarterly accruals.
- Own the end-to-end procurement process (Purchase Requisitions to Payment) for the Enterprise team, ensuring 100% compliance with Red Hat global finance policies.
- Financial Governance & Budget Management (30%):

- Produce the monthly Top Accounts performance dashboard, consolidating data from multiple sources to show marketing impact on sales pipeline.
- Manage the "marketing operations hygiene" within Salesforce and Tableau, ensuring all campaigns are tagged and tracked correctly for pipeline reporting.
- Data, Reporting & ROI (20%):

- Act as the "Guardian of Process," ensuring the team adheres to lead management and data privacy standards.
- Identify bottlenecks in our current opera
role_fit_rationale: Specialist-level ops/admin role, not manager/lead; misaligned seniority and strategic scope.
skills_match_rationale: Salesforce, Tableau, campaign ops, vendor management align; but role emphasizes finance/procurement heavily.
company_snapshot: Red Hat: global MNC, strong culture (4.2★), good work-life balance; some concerns about management layers and pay.
red_flags: Role is operational/support, likely a step down in seniority.
standout_positives: Strong global brand; APAC regional scope; tech industry.

About Plaud Inc.Plaud is building the world's most trusted AI work companion for professionals to elevate productivity and performance through note-taking solutions, loved by over 1,000,000 users worldwide since 2023. With a mission to amplify human intelligence, Plaud is building the next-generation intelligence infrastructure and interfaces to capture, extract, and utilize what you say, hear, see, and think.Plaud Inc. is a Delaware-incorporated, San Francisco-based company pushing the boundary of human–AI intelligence through a hardware–software combination. With ISO 27001, ISO 27701, GDPR, SOC 2, HIPAA, and EN 18031 compliance, Plaud is committed to the highest standards of data security and privacy protection.To learn more about Plaud, please visit https://www.plaud.ai and follow along on Instagram, X, Facebook, LinkedIn, and YouTubeWhy You Should Join UsPlaud is building the next generation intelligence infrastructure and interfaces to capture, extract, and utilize intelligence from what people say, hear, see, and think.

- Market-competitive compensation, global exposure, and a vibrant, creativity-fueled work atmosphere.
- Grow your career in a culture that champions continuous learning and fast career development.
- Work with passionate teammates who value innovation, collaboration, and customer success.
- Gain exposure to cutting-edge AI for Pro tools and play a direct role in our global expansion.
- Define the next-gen paradigm for human-AI interaction.
- Plaud is a bootstrapped, skyrocketing, profitable company with a $250M revenue run rate achieved in just three years.

What You Will Do

- Optimize segmentation, personalization, lifecycle flows, and testing programs to maximize LTV across EU markets.
- Personally lead retention strategy for France, validating copy quality and ensuring messaging aligns with French cultural and aesthetic expectatio
role_fit_rationale: Email specialist role, not marketing manager. Hardware company. Narrow channel focus, not strategic leadership.
skills_match_rationale: Strong email/lifecycle marketing experience, but role demands EU/French market and retention specialization.
company_snapshot: AI hardware-software startup, $250M revenue run rate, bootstrapped and profitable. Glassdoor reviews appear to be for Plaid, not Plaud—sparse reliable data.
red_flags: Hardware company; JD truncated; Glassdoor reviews mismatched to Plaid
standout_positives: Profitable, fast-growing AI company with global exposure
